title: Inconspicuous sequence of prepare, execute, commit and close produces error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE T (a Int32, b String NOT NULL, c Float32 DEFAULT 0.0);
ALTER TABLE T UPDATE c = NULL WHERE a = 1;
ALTER TABLE T DELETE WHERE b = 'test';
SELECT * FROM T WHERE c IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Sequence of prepare, execute, commit, and close
